post.description: Creates a new board with the specified name and description.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of boards, optionally filtered by project ID and name.

patch.description: Partially updates a board. Only fields included in the request body are applied.

delete.description: Deletes an existing board by its ID.

post.description: Creates a new list for a board. The status must exist and the list order index is derived from the selected status.

get.summary: Get a paginated list of lists
get.description: Retrieves lists with optional filtering by board and name.

patch.description: Partially updates a list. If statusId is provided, the status must exist and list order index is recalculated from that status.

delete.description: Deletes a list only when it has no active tasks associated with it.

post.description: Creates a new project with the specified name and description.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of projects, with optional filtering by user ID, board ID, and project name.

patch.description: Partially updates a project. Only fields included in the request body are applied.

post.description: Creates a new status with the specified name, order index, and color. Color must be a hex value in the format #RRGGBB.

get.summary: Get a paginated list of statuses
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of statuses with optional filtering and sorting.

patch.description: Partially updates a status. Only fields included in the request body are applied. Color must be a hex value in the format #RRGGBB.

delete.description: Deletes an existing status by setting its IsActive flag to false.

post.description: Creates a new task and records a status history entry for its initial status.

get.summary: Get a paginated list of tasks
get.description: Retrieves active tasks with optional filtering by board, list, status, and assignee.

patch.description: Partially updates a task and records a corresponding status history entry.

delete.description: Soft deletes the task and hard deletes all related status history entries in a transaction.
Only administrators can delete users. The userId is specified in the path and the caller is resolved from the JWT token.

get.description: Search for users by first name, last name, or email with pagination support. Only administrators can call this endpoint, validated from the JWT token.
